description: A simple branching story about exploring a forest.

start.name: Forest Entrance
start.description: You stand at the entrance of a dark forest. Two paths lie ahead.

river.name: River
river.description: You arrive at a rushing river.

cabin.name: Old Cabin
cabin.description: You find an abandoned cabin in the woods.

waterfall.name: Waterfall
waterfall.description: You reach a tall waterfall with a hidden cave behind it.

treasure.name: Hidden Treasure
treasure.description: You discover a hidden treasure and become rich.

drowned.name: Drowned
drowned.description: The river current is too strong. You drown.

lost.name: Lost in the Forest
lost.description: You wander too far and become hopelessly lost.
